mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (post_id, user_id, parent_id, content, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE post_id = #{postId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
